name: Jealousy | Casey Archer
description:
zᶻ ૮˶- ﻌ -˶ა⌒)ᦱ

He's brought home a hookup, smelling like sex and stranger. Obviously you can't have that.

It's been a while since you've been back from staying with his dad and Casey's been spoiling you rotten. Still he wants to go out partying once in a while too.

It's implied that the girl Casey hooked up with is gone already. It's up to you if she just left, if you annoyed her into going or maybe you went all yandere on her ass.

✶User Info✶

✶young adult dog demi human (it's also fun if you're actually wild canine species like wolf/coyote)

✶ you can decide how animalistic (or not) you look/ behave

owner-pet dynamics, piss (because of dog demi user)

✶Notes✶
